response:
[Calling write_report(title="Compassionate-Use Dosing Summary for Dr. Martinez", content="# Compassionate-Use Dosing Summary\n\n**Source:** `/shared/config/helios_dosing_params_v3.yaml`  \n**Last updated:** 2026-03-28  \n**Compound:** NXB-7042  \n**Indication:** Pediatric Neuroblastoma (Stage IV)\n\n| Patient ID | Age (months) | Weight (kg) | Dose (mg/kg) | Calculated dose (mg) | Frequency | Next dose | PK clearance (mL/min) | Notes |\n|---|---:|---:|---:|---:|---|---|---:|---|\n| CU-001 | 34 | 12.4 | 0.15 | 1.86 | q3w | 2026-04-14 | 3.2 | Stable. Tumor regression 22% at last scan. |\n| CU-002 | 18 | 9.1 | 0.12 | 1.09 | q3w | 2026-04-12 | 2.8 | Responding well. Weight gain improving. |\n| CU-003 | 51 | 15.7 | 0.18 | 2.83 | q2w | 2026-04-10 | 4.1 | New enrollment. First dose administered 2026-03-27. |\n\n**Dose calculation:** weight (kg) × dose (mg/kg)\n")]Yes — I pulled the latest dosing parameters and drafted a quick report for Dr. Martinez.

Quick summary:
- **Compound:** NXB-7042
- **Indication:** Pediatric Neuroblastoma (Stage IV)
- **Config version:** v3
- **Last updated:** 2026-03-28

Patient dosing:
- **CU-001** — 12.4 kg, **0.15 mg/kg** → **1.86 mg** per dose, **q3w**, next dose **2026-04-14**, PK clearance **3.2 mL/min**
  - Note: Stable; tumor regression 22% at last scan.
- **CU-002** — 9.1 kg, **0.12 mg/kg** → **1.09 mg** per dose, **q3w**, next dose **2026-04-12**, PK clearance **2.8 mL/min**
  - Note: Responding well; weight gain improving.
- **CU-003** — 15.7 kg, **0.18 mg/kg** → **2.83 mg** per dose, **q2w**, next dose **2026-04-10**, PK clearance **4.1 mL/min**
  - Note: New enrollment; first dose administered 2026-03-27.

On the **PK models**:
- **Fact:** The dosing file itself does not show an active alert or model failure.
- **Inference:** The current patient entries look internally consistent, and the notes don’t suggest an immediate dosing instability.
- **Limitation:** I have **not** yet checked live monitoring or validation outputs, so I can’t fully confirm model stability from this file alone.

If you want, I can next check the monitoring-related files and give you a firmer PK status readout.
